task_description: Implement all 5 phases of the MemKarti game features: (1) Dynamic deck from server with new memes/situations/categories, (2) Player profiles + statistics via server-side JSON, (3) Leaderboard + join by link/QR, (4) Reconnection + host transfer for online reliability, (5) Dark theme + sounds + haptics. Push to appropriate branches to trigger CI builds and redeploy.

verification.summary: Server typecheck clean, app typecheck clean, Docker image builds successfully, server starts and loads all modules (deck 160 memes/156 situations, profiles, leaderboard, QA). No test files per user request.
